heading: Lake Oswego, Oregon; Lake Coeur d’Alene, Idaho; and Lake George, New York
label: 59m Lake Oswego, Oregon; Lake Coeur d’Alene, Idaho; and Lake George, New York
text: For the purposes of the following bodies of water are declared nonnavigable: Lake Oswego, Oregon; Lake Coeur d’Alene, Idaho; and Lake George, New York.section 403 of this title
